title: cirrus: CI agent stopped responding
body:
Since the update to a newer CI image which of course brings in a much newer kernel I keep seeing `CI agent stopped responding!` errors from cirrus there.

Possible reasons is that something is killing the agent process, maybe we run out of memory somehow? OR maybe something else breaks the networking?

It is a flake and passes on rerun so whatever it is, it is not consistent.

The main issue we do not get any useful logs either due that so not sure how we best debug this

Two example cirrus tasks:
https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5416603430420480
https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5638759170965504

I think I only saw this on rawhide so far so it seems safe to assume it is something in the image which causes it and not cirrus itself.

comments.body: Ok nevermind also seeing this on f43 here https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6281948441608192

https://cirrus-ci.org/faq/#ci-agent-stopped-responding seeing this to suggest the vm memory issue. since we don't have any gcp memory collection tool, i cannot see any OOM from gcp logs. research a bit seems need some customized login in startup script. worth to do it ?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
maybe close this one, since this is no longer relevant.
